$comment: Provenance + reproducibility manifest for Unit 4 of v0.2.0. Per Codex iter-1 #7: enables review without exposing prod credentials.

source.preserved_from: 100-doc backfill on 2026-04-25 (worker paused after 22 SUCCEEDED; bug output preserved)

sampling.method: deterministic random with seed=42 for large docs; full coverage for small docs

documents.gcs_key: Regs - Army Pubs/Policy/AR 380-381 SPECIAL ACCESS PROGRAMS_SAPS_AND SENSITIVE ACTIVITIES CSA 2004_04_21_OCR.pdf
Regs - Army Pubs/Policy/AR 637-2 SEPARATION PAY_NONDISABILITY_AND LEVELS OF PAYMENT G-1 2022_08_18_OCR.pdf
Regs - Army Pubs/Policy/AR 115-10 WEATHER SUPPORT FOR THE U.S. ARMY {AFI 15-157_IP_} G-2 2021_09_02_OCR.pdf
Regs - Army Pubs/Policy/AR 700-13 WORLDWIDE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE MILITARY MUNITIONS_AMMUNITION_LOGISTICS_SURVEILLANCE_EXPLOSIVES SAFETY REVIEW AND TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM G-4 2020_12_15_OCR.pdf

reproducibility.fetch_pdfs: Hetzner: gsutil cp <gcs_key> /tmp/; scp to validation_set/pdfs/ locally
reproducibility.fetch_rows: ssh hetzner 'PGPASSWORD=$(extract from /etc/fedresearch/backend.env) psql --csv -c "SELECT replace(d.canonical_id, ''Army Regulation|'', ''''), def.pdf_page_index, def.term, left(def.definition, 80) FROM definitions def JOIN documents d ON d.id = def.document_id WHERE d.canonical_id IN (4-doc list)"'
